overview.ko: Nutex Health Inc는 Healthcare 분야 Medical Care Facilities 기업입니다.
overview.en: Nutex Health Inc. operates as a healthcare services and operations company in the United States. It operates through three segments: Hospital, Population Health Management (PHM), and Real Estate.
